text.title: reranking-diversity-mmr Decision Tree
text.summary: Decision tree for reranking-diversity-mmr application; concludes with rule-id refs or skip.

decision-tree.root-question: Does the candidate pool have near-duplicates that hurt diversity for the query?

branch.conclusion: Skip MMR; diversity hurts factoid queries.

example.description: Top-20 retrieval returns 8 near-duplicates of the same doc; MMR with λ=0.5 picks 5 diverse ones.
